summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Music Video Factory audio processing and AI image generation features. Backend APIs work correctly with proper error handling, frontend UI integrates seamlessly with backend services.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 401 instead of 400 when OpenAI API key not configured
minor_issues.impact: Minor - error handling still works, just different status code

Climax extraction endpoint validation (correctly returns 400 for no audio)
Cost logging integration and retrieval
Project concept and images update endpoints
Frontend Step 1 (Song Input) - form fields and validation

Step navigation and progress tracking

UI responsiveness and design consistency
